entry.title: Re: SAP BTP SDK for iOS 10.0 is now available
entry.content:
@sandeeptds why are you just releasing a new SDK 10.0.2 while announcing you are moving ahead with 24.4.0 new versionning, we are a little bit confused ?

and also the release note of SDK 10.0.2 is still being created, this is not the first time I saw this pattern, not being able to publish a release note before the SDK

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA - Empowering Your Homepage: Enabling My Home for SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS0
entry.content: Very useful information. I would have expected to find this in the documentation, but I don't think that's the case.

entry.title: Re: Scheduled Report shows successful status; but Mail se...
entry.content: I'd agree except for KBA 1778797. It states, 'The email was dropped after the SMTP server accepted the email from the Adaptive Job Server".... I show no evidence the SMTP server "Accepted" the message. A telenet to the SMTP port on SendGrid and manually generating a message results in an immediate error from the SendGrid Server. "Send-MailMesssage : Mailbox unavailable. The server response was: Error reading data, max message size exceeded" So I ask what evidence is there the BOBJ server received "Acceptance" from the SendGrid mail server? Or is BOBJ sending a "well formed email" and going with a "Fire and forget" approach? If it's this how is this an "Acceptance?" I know this is getting into the weeds; but it's what my interpertation of the text is and I want to better understand the meaning of the KBA.

entry.title: SAP BW/4 - revamp and true to the line 2024
entry.content:
last changed: 26th of April 2024

SAP BW/4 - revamp and true to the line 2024

 Blog Content

  • where (my) the cool stuff happens ...
  • SAP First Guidance
  • SAP BW NLS Solution
  • SAP BW/4HANA
  • SAP BW Upgrade
  • SAP BW Installation/Configuration on/for HANA
  • SAP BW and BI-JAVA Installation
  • SAP BW Migration to BWoH
  • SAP BW System copy
  • Event  Presentations
  • Additional Topics

 

 SAP BW/4HANA

  • SAP Community - SAP BW/4 HANA Community - Application Lifecycle Management
  • SAP BW? - three things to know...
  • why SAP BW/4HANA?
  • Analytics with SAP | SAP HANA 2.0 – An Introduction
  • SAP Product and Solution Roadmaps
  • Overview SAP Business Warehouse (legacy Information)
  • SAP BW(/4) on HANA Features -
    Features 7.40 SP05 - Features 7.40 SP08/SP09 - Features 7.50 SP00/SP01 - Features 7.50 SP04/SP05 - Features BW/4HANA SP00 - Features BW/4HANA SP04 - Features BW/4HANA SP08 (FP01) - Roadmap BW/4HANA 2.0 - What's new with SAP BW/4HANA 2.0 SP04 - TechEd-2020 SAP Analytics Q/A Summary (SAP DWC, SAC, BW4HANA) - Day 1 - What's new with SAP BW/4HANA 2.0 SP07 - What’s new with SAP BW/4HANA 2021     - What's new with SAP BW/4HANA 2021 SP04 new!

 

SAP BW Upgrade

Information for the Upgrade to SAP BW 7.50 and BW/4HANA:

    • Presentation: Upgrade to SAP BW 7.50 (Last Update: 14th of December 2020)
    • SAP BEx Community Page
    • SUM for ABAP - Troubleshooting Guide
    • Blog: Upgrade BW/4HANA 2.0 - the time is now ...

Additional Information about the former BW release upgrades:

        • Presentation: Upgrade to SAP BW 7.40
        • the Legend is back, "the Upgrade Bible": Upgrade to SAP BW 7.0x
        • Good News - Easier Modeling of the SEM Add-On in Solution Manager


SL related BLOG's:

        • Maintenance Planner – The Next Generation Experience for Landscape Maintenance with SAP Solution Man...
        • Downtime minimization when upgrading BW systems

ASU Toolbox (incl. BW Specific Content) and BW Upgrade pre/post Task List

With the ASU (application specific upgrade) toolbox, customers get one single truth for all pre/post upgrade steps regarding the technical upgrade to SAP BW 7.0x  and all following releases.

More detailed information about the ASU toolbox can be found in note 1000009. This tool has been available since 2008 and has been enhanced and allows application specific and technical resources to work together for a successful upgrade to SAP BW 7.50 and higher. Together with the BW Housekeeping Task List, there are also additional Task Lists available to simplify preparation of the application-specific part.

Note 1734333 - BW Pre and Post Upgrade and Migration Tasks
See also the - SAP First Guidance - BW Housekeeping and BW-PCA

 

SAP BW/4 and BI-JAVA legacy Installation

In addition the SAP BW Installation/Configuration (also on HANA) includes the complete SAP BW basis customizing settings, together with an example configuration of the system parameter. 

The technical configuration is an elementary part of setting up and operating SAP system landscapes. For example, you have to perform initial technical configuration to bring a newly installed system into operation. But also during the lifecycle of an SAP system, technical parameters have to be set and adapted.

Blog: BI-JAVA, BEx Web and EP: the real connection...

 

As a successor for most scenarios, we offer the combined export of the Java system, de-installation of the Java Add-In and installation of a new Java system using the dual-stack split tool available as part of the SL toolset 1.0 (SP05). For more information, see "Dual-Stack Split".

With SAP NetWeaver 7.50 JAVA the Functional Unit Configuration UI (former CTC BI-JAVA Template) is available. 

In Advance check the WebAS/SSO Settings after the Upgrade to NetWeaver 7.3x.
The settings are almost identical to NetWeaver BW 7.0x

Migration to SAP BW on SAP HANA (BWoH)

Database Migration Option (DMO) of SUM - Introduction

DMO is an option of SUM (Software Update Manager) for a combined update and migration: update an existing SAP system to a higher Software Release and migrate to SAP HANA database including the unicode conversion of the source database. The procedure is only available for systems based on AS ABAP, hence the executable SAPup is used in background. DMO migrates from an existing relational database type (“anyDB”) to SAP HANA. Software Update Manager (SUM) is the tool for system maintenance: Release upgrades, EHP implementation, applying SP stacks.

              • Blog: optimizing system downtime is timeless ...
              • Blog: HANA 1.0 vs HANA 2.0 - plan your Migration wisely ...

Please Note that since Q1/2014 the Presentation -
Migration to BW on HANA - First Guidance concludes all of these manual efforts now.
=> Updated January 2020

SAP First Guidance - Using the new DMO to migrate to BW on HANA



More flexibility with SAP BW Post-Copy Automation

To achieve this, SAP NetWeaver Landscape Virtualization Management offers preconfigured "task lists" used by the ABAP task manager for lifecycle management automation.

SAP Note 886102 (SMP login required) thus becomes obsolete. Using the post-copy automation for SAP BW (BW PCA) in the migration process of SAP BW to SAP BW on SAP HANA, this process can be shortened by weeks and becomes easier, faster and more reliable.

The former presentation TechEd 2014 - Session ITM206 still illustrates the migration to SAP BW on SAP HANA from an end-to-end perspective.

  • BLOG: Three things to know when migrating SAP BW on SAP HANA
  • BLOG: Migration of SAP Systems to SAP HANA
  • BLOG: Where to find information on SAP BW on SAP HANA migrations
  • BLOG: The SAP HANA Reference for NetWeaver Basis Administrators
  • BLOG: Migration to SAP HANA: Latest News about SAP Note 1775293

 

SAP BW System Copy

PDF help: User Guide for SAP BW Note Analyzer
Note 2743291 - PCA for BW/4HANA
Note 2570363 - Availability of BW PCA for BW/4HANA
Note 1707321 - BW System Copy: Post Copy Automation (BW-PCA)
Note 1614266 - System Copy: Post-Copy Automation (PCA) / SAP Landscape Management (LaMa)

Since Release 7.30 SP05, it is now possible to perform a heterogeneous system copy (including unicode migration) to migrate existing systems based on SAP BW 7.30 SP05 and higher to SAP BW on SAP HANA (HDB) based systems.

With this major step forward, a new procedure called "Post Copy Automation (BW PCA)" now supports customers with what can often be complex post-steps before and after the homogenous/heterogeneous BW system copy. This presentation is the delta information to the existing document "SAP NetWeaver 7.30 - BW Systemcopy ABAP" shown above. The technical Improvements with the leaner data model provides advantages with BW on HANA too.

You can also refer to the SAP First Guidance Documents
- SAP First Guidance – SAP BW on HANA – Edition 2021
- SAP First Guidance - BW Housekeeping and BW-PCA

Blog - System Copy Automation for SAP Business Warehouse System Landscapes
Blog - New Note Analyzer for SAP BW PCA and Housekeeping
Blog - System Copy Automation for SAP Business Warehouse System Landscapes (BW PCA)

Note 2534288 - HEC Service "Homogeneous System Copy / System Refresh (ABAP)
Note 2681701 - System Copy: Task Content (12.1 Improvements)


Updating to the minimum level of the mentioned Support Stacks is recommended to minimize the manual effort. For both cases the BW-PCA Task lists support the customer together with the software provisioning manager 1.0 (SWPM) in these software lifecycle management tasks. BW-PCA is embedded in the SAP NetWeaver Landscape Virtualization Management

 

Event Presentations


Presentation - Hitchhiker’s Guide to NetWeaver or “thank you for the fish …” (simply timeless)

Presentation - Upgrade S/4HANA Version 2020 -Basis View

 

Additional Topics like References, Experiences, etc.

Product Availability Matrix (PAM) for Business Warehouse Accelerator 7.20 (BWA)
Note 1845809 - Latest Revision for BWA 7.20
Note 2495501 - BWA 7.20: Revision 41
Note 2665383 - BWA 7.20: Revision 42
Note 2887737 - BWA 7.20: Revision 44 (05.02.2020)
Note 3284562 - BWA 7.20: Revision 49 (30.12.2022)

This is a collection of resources from the former SCN Network and its content is not reflecting the findings from this document of future upgrade and enhancements.

Blog - IE11 will no longer be supported by various SAP UI technologies in newer releases
Blog - SAP BW Upgrade: Pre and Post upgrade activities with answer to why?
Blog - SAP BW 7.4 Powered by HANA -- Promising Features (Part 1)
Blog - ABAP CDS in SAP BW
Blog - SAP BI4.x Installation/Update/Patching
Blog - Removal of only Time Dependent Attribute added Accidentally
Blog - Some interesting Facts of Compatibility Views in SAP BW/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA - SAP Cloud Integration into SAP BW/4HANA - further Content from frank.riesner1 (SAP)
Blog - How to load Flat Files from MS Office 365 to BW/4HANA using SDI / DP-Agent

DSAG Forum: "TG Road 2 BW/4HANA" => (DSAG-ID requested) share your experience with other DSAG members.


Roland Kramer, SAP first-guidance
@RolandKramer

 “I have no special talent, I am only passionately curious.”

entry.title: Re: CCM Delta accruals calculation
entry.content:
Hi Joris,

I'm not sure I understand the goal of your process. 
If you create a Manual Delta accrual (via WB2R_DOC_ENTRY) after the partial settlement then the amount you will post in the manual delta accrual will be an extra accrual posting. 
Manual Delta accrual will only adjust open accrual value but will not look at the already open accrual nor at the already settled amount. 

Feel free to reach out on LinkedIn to see if I can help you quickly on what you're trying to achieve instead of back and forth here. 

Regards, 
Gauthier Victor

entry.title: Re: SAP ByDesign : Server error "INVALID_CHARACTERISTIC_NAME"
entry.content: I have the same error, even though the same query could to work flawlessly for days on end. Sometimes it starts returning `Program error in class CL_RSBOLAP_QV_AXIS method : INVALID_CHARACTERISTIC_NAME`

entry.title: Re: How can we use a odata connection of datasphere to cr...
entry.content:
Hi @Henry_Lee,

First of all, your screenshots are so small that nothing is readable! You could stretch them out and make them bigger. 🙂

Your question & objective is very interesting indeed! -> "using a odata connection of datasphere to create datasets or models on sac" What is the use case here?

If you need to consume Datasphere data in SAC please check out Consume Data in SAP Analytics Cloud via a Live Connection 

Basically you need to create live connection from SAP Analytics Cloud to SAP Datasphere then you can data exposed as analytic models and perspectives to create stories and analytic applications in SAC. You don't need to create datasets or models explicitly for Datasphere data objects in SAC. 

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 4 - Mobile device capabilities

entry.title: Re: Enhance your SAP Datasphere Experience with API Access
entry.content:
Hi @thorebedey,

I think your blog post heading "Enhance your SAP Datasphere Experience with API Access" and using API in your statements are misleading -at least confusing and it could cause misunderstanding 😁

IMHO What I see you are referring to Accessing SAP Datasphere via the Command Line and as you already gave a links  CLI: Overview  and Use CRUD Operations with SAP Datasphere CLI

This is SAP Datasphere API - Consume Data via the OData API, Access the SAP Datasphere OData API and SAP Datasphere API

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite – Access Policies for Integration Packages
entry.content: @PeterGutsche - I can see access policy feature at Integration package level. I have additional question. when I am trying to create service key for Process integration runtime with API as Plan, I am not able to see any custom roles. how can we add custom role (associated with access policy) via API access?  help docu (below snap) talks about API based access so I assume this should work with custom role while creating service key. Please let me know.

entry.title: Re: CPI connectivity with MS SQL Server on-prem using Cloud Connector
entry.content:
Hello,

Just wanted to share the solution to this error.

ERROR: 

The processing has failed due to error in creating metadata table. : com.microsoft.sqlserver.jdbc.SQLServerException: Cannot open server "localhost" requested by the login. The login failed.

SOLUTION:

https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/t5/azure-database-support-blog/lesson-learned-251-error-40532-using-private-endpoint-ip-in-the/ba-p/3698822

entry.title: Re: Sales Order Enhancement Series: The Material View
entry.content:
Hi Dr Ingo Woesner,

I had the opportunity to implement this as one of the first few instances in the US for a major pharma distributor. I must say, it was is a very wide functionality. I wanted to seek your help on the following:

1. Is this supported with S4 HANA ?

2. We have a situation where stocks are placed at a customer as consignment. Stocks are also carried by the field sales associates ( which we plan to show as consignment stock ). That being said, can we use this functionality to leverage close by locations as field sales associate stocks ? That way, when the order is created, the customer sales associate can also see stocks with field sales associates in the same territory as the customer and instead route the order to be filled by the field sales associate ? 

3. In my previous experience with this functionality in ECC, it required a set up of a server with indexes for material search. Is that the same with S4 HANA ? 

Appreciate your help

entry.title: Re: Required Handling Units could not be found error in P...
entry.content:
Same error for me.

Does anybody have an idea?

entry.title: Re: RFID wristbands for FEC (Family Entertainment Center)...
entry.content:
Hey Kawish,

  1. SAP Customer Checkout (CCO) has customers who have combined the CCO Gift Card Management with RFID Tags and use these Gift Cards for payment. You can top up gift cards and later use them for payment. The gift card ID is stored on the RFID Tag.

  2. There are customers who have integrated external payment systems with CCO. For this, a plugin needs to be developed.

Best regards, Harald

entry.title: S/4HANA Cloud Live connection SAP Analytcis Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I need your help. Currently I am confinguring the live connection between S/4HANA Cloud and SAP Anlytics Cloud. I have followed the documentation in https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/0485d540e0b340a0bc0da86fe368997c.html however I am stucked in the following step: 

SAML Single Sign-On (SSO) must be enabled in SAP Analytics Cloud

 

We are using SAP IAS, could you please explain me how to upload the metadata file from SAP  Analytics cloud to SAP IAS? Thank you #sapanalyticscloud #s/4hanacloud

entry.title: Explore the newly uploaded videos on the Sales Cloud Version 2 channel.
entry.content:
Hello Learners,
We are thrilled to bring you the latest enrichments to your microlearning journey on our Sales Cloud V2 platform!
Allow us to introduce you to our fresh batch of Expert User Videos. They delve into exciting, impactful topics like extensibility, usage of pro-code /no-code among other advanced Sales Cloud features. Crafted by experts and filled with deep insights, these newly-minted resources are here to give you an upper hand in mastering the Sales Cloud V2.

Moreover, we've expanded our content library to include an extensive playlist on Using Surveys. This particular compilation will walk you through the various features and functionalities of surveys, equipping you with knowledge and skills to utilize this tool to its fullest potential.

As we are committed to making your learning journey with us fruitful and engaging, we are consistently working to expand our wealth of content to match your evolving needs. Tune in and keep seizing these opportunities to grow!
SAP Sales Cloud Customer Experience Training

entry.title: niserver not running
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

our support team asked me for help. They are getting a monitoring alert, that the process niserver is not running.
This is a server with ContentServer and MaxDB.

When I check ps -ef | grep niserver, there is no such process and the colleagues are claiming that it had been
running in the past. When I try to start it (either by x_server start or by calling it directly by ./niserver) it says
that it is already running:

NISERVER NI Init: Already running

Could you please elaborate on that ?

- Is the process named differently ?
- Should they remove the process niserver from their monitoring ?

We havent changed or upgraded nothing and were not touching the system for quite a while.
Linux upgrade is upcoming.

entry.title: Re: Fiori app for IDoc Monitoring
entry.content: Thank you. Fiori app " "IDoc monitor for Incoming SD orders". App ID- EMORD" is the solution.

entry.title: Re: Explanation of the Delta Posting Logic in Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation
entry.content:
Hi Kevin

I agree with Ugur. The final realized exchange rate is 1000 EUR and not any valuation process should influence the value posted on that account.

I'm afraid this may not be an issue with an example but the valuation program is actually posting on realized differences. It was mention in community: https://community.sap.com/t5/finance-q-a/acv-clearing-posting/qaq-p/288004

I'm looking forward for explanation on this issue.

BR

Malgorzata

entry.title: Re: SAP IDOC Elements and Links Diagram
entry.content:
IDocs can be tricky at first. Here's a breakdown for beginners:

**Imagine IDoc (Intermediate Document) as a special envelope for data in SAP.**

* **What it carries:** IDoc carries data between different systems and SAP modules. Think of it as carrying specific documents like invoices, purchase orders, or customer data.
* **The format:** IDoc has a pre-defined structure, like a form with sections for specific information (item numbers, prices, etc.). This ensures everyone understands the data.
* **The mailroom:** There's a special department in SAP called ALE (Application Link Enabling) that handles IDocs. It's like a mailroom that routes IDocs to the right places within SAP.

**Here's why IDocs are handy:**

* **Standardized:** Everyone using SAP understands the IDoc format, making data exchange smooth.
* **Reliable:** IDocs ensure data arrives correctly, even if there are temporary glitches.
* **Efficient:** They're great for high-volume data exchanges.

**Are IDocs always the best option?**

* **Not necessarily.** If you need more flexibility with data formats or want to connect with non-SAP systems, an API (Application Programming Interface) might be a better choice. Think of an API as a more modern, adaptable way to exchange data.

IDocs (Intermediate Documents) in SAP can be confusing, but the good news is you only need to know a few key transactions to get by! Think of these transactions as shortcuts to manage your IDocs. Here's a simplified breakdown:

**Receiving IDocs:**

* **WE01 (Display IDoc):** This is your go-to transaction to see the details of an existing IDoc. Imagine it as opening a specific envelope to see its contents.

* **WE02 (Change IDoc):** In case something's wrong with the data in an IDoc, you can use this transaction to edit it. Think of it as correcting a mistake on the envelope before sending it further.

* **BD87 (Process IDoc Inbound):** This is like the mailroom sorting function. It processes received IDocs and distributes them to the relevant areas within SAP (like creating a sales order based on an invoice IDoc).

**Sending IDocs:**

* **BD84 (Process IDoc Outbound):** This is the workhorse for sending IDocs out of SAP. Imagine this as handing a completed envelope to the mail carrier for delivery.

* **SM59 (Maintain RFC Destinations):** This transaction helps define the connection details for external systems that will receive your IDocs. Think of it as writing the address on the envelope for smooth delivery.

**Bonus:**

* **WE16 (Delete IDoc):** Once you're sure you don't need an IDoc anymore, you can delete it using this transaction. Think of it as throwing away an empty envelope.


Remember, these are the main ones for starters. As you get more comfortable with IDocs, you might explore other transactions for specific functionalities.


Hopefully, this clarifies IDocs for you! Feel free to ask if you have any more questions.

entry.title: Re: SAP IDOC Elements and Links Diagram
entry.content: https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7189492884767670272/

entry.title: Re: Quick & Easy Datasphere - When to use Data Flow, Transformation Flow, SQL View?
entry.content:
Hi @yagiz_onat,

It's good to see your blog post. 😉 What a great example for Transformation Flows with SQL View Transformation --SQLScript (Table Function)-- 

There are too many options for modeling in Datasphere and it certainly requires some kind of decision & thought process. Yours is very practical and useful. Thanks for sharing all in detail. 

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: How can I Copy Material Master in S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
How can I Copy Material Master in S/4HANA Public Cloud? We have a requirement in a Chemical Industry where we have to Mask Material Description as they can be seen by the Master Data Team but while creating a PR/PO that description needs to be masked to something generic.

 

Since we do not have Masking mechanism in Public Cloud through SAP Security how can we duplicate this Material Creation in another Material Group. Customer does not want any manual task. It should be automatically be created at the point of Unmasked Material Creation.

 

What approach should be the Best?

SAP Business Process Automation

SAP Build Automation

SAP Custom Business Object

Etc.

Please also kindly provide steps and an API that we can use to achieve this. 

 

Thanks

Arghadip

@arghadipkar3013

entry.title: Re: Object store secret mys-object-store-secret not found
entry.content:
Hi Niharika

I don't see Object Store Secrets as saved

you must follow the guide;

https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-ai-core/sap-ai-core-service-guide/register-your-object-store-secret

please confirm this is done and you see the secrets on screen "Object Store Secrets"

confirm which step of that guide is failing

entry.title: Where can I find the SAP Business AI Portfolio?
entry.content:
We  recommend to access our Exploring the SAP Business AI Portfolio learning journey.

Overview 
This learning journey explores SAP's Business AI strategy, its principles, ethics, privacy standards, and the opportunities it presents for your business.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, you will be able to:

  • Demonstrate a comprehensive understanding of the key components and principles of SAP's Business AI strategy, the role of generative AI, and SAP's ethical and privacy standards.
  • Be able to articulate SAP Business AI's value proposition, including the role of Joule, the AI Foundation, the Generative AI Hub, and SAP BTP.
  • Develop a strategic plan detailing how you can leverage the SAP Business AI opportunity for growth and competitive advantage in your organization.

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

We appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

entry.title: Re: Production order number range
entry.content:
Hi @BettyChu 

 

If the number range assigned to the Production Order is exhausted then you can follow the

KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3302170 and assign a new number range 

 

When a number range has reached its limit , it rolls over to the start again so the alternative is to start

archiving Production orders using archiving object PP_ORDER

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Custom Fields for Goods Receipt Label
entry.content:
Hi Mike,

Thanks for the answer. I already read that note, but it doesn't mention anything about goods receipts. I also haven't found anything about adding more default values for custom fields when printing goods receipt labels.

entry.title: Re: Mexico Electronic Accounting - Multiple UUIDs and Mass Upload.
entry.content: Did you managed to resolve this? If Yes, how?

entry.title: Using Integration Suite API's with Basic Auth
entry.content:
Hi Everyone.

I try to create packages using the Integration Suite API's.
This works when I use Client Credentials from the api-service-instance that I created in my Foundry BTP.

Now my problem:
The Package is createdBy the Client-ID:

Since this doesn't look good, I want it to display my user. As far as I know there is no possibility to do this with the API-service-instance. Therefore I need to authenticate using my user.

I found that there should be a way to do that:
https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/basic-authentication-of-idp-user-for-api-clients

Now when I try to call an API from Postman with Basic Authentication and my Universal-ID I get an error-message even though I gave myself full permission on all "!it"-roles:
"Error while obtaining token from UAA, with details: Request failed with status code 401"

I couldn't find anything online corresponding with this error-message.

What am I doing wrong?

Thanks for the help

entry.title: Re: 7 Most Commonly Asked Questions About Package Configuration Manager for SAP SuccessFactors Solut
entry.content:
Hi,

hi @JayBisnik 

I was trying to push the sap best practice block from Pacman to preview instance for one of our customer. But it got skipped. May I know what is the possible reason for that because when i pushed same block for our own instance it got successfully deployed but now failed for our customer preview instance.

br,

Akash Bansal

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori: How to perform masking for Fiori applicati...
entry.content:
Hi Sumangala,

Masking in OData V4 is part of Roadmap and is currently in evaluation phase. We would be able to comment further by Q4/2024.

Regards,

Arun

entry.title: Re: Subsequent implementation of non leading ledger with a diferent fiscal year variant

entry.title: Re: UI Data Protection Masking add-on
entry.content: Hi Cheryl, I believe you might have already figured out the solution. If not then please note that UI Masking is a lincenced Add-On and you need to talk to your AE for it. Unless you have licenced it, You may not be even able to see that in download list.

entry.title: Re: Crystal jars upgrade with Wildfly and JDK
entry.content:
You can get the latest CR for Eclipse from here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354088796.html

Along with details about platform support, licensing, etc.

Lots of reasons for performance issues, using Page N of M in the report will cause the report to render completely before showing the first page, enabling Verify options on the DB can cause delays also as well as others.

Have a look at this page and look for performance and optimizing reports:

https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/crystal-reports/faq

entry.title: Re: Now available: ABAP Platform Trial
entry.content:
Hi @kyo_choi2 

Try: docker pull sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial:ABAPTRIAL_2022

entry.title: PLU-7638 - Hide password reset option?
entry.content:
Hi,

I am a bit confused why the password reset option has been given a much more prominent place in the user menu. As SAP is pushing customers to migrate to IAS the password reset option doesn't do anything anymore and it is now front and center which will mean more users will change their SF password and not their IAS password risking locking themselves out.

Is there a way to hide the option for users?

entry.title: Re: Subsequent implementation of non leading ledger with a diferent fiscal year variant
entry.content: Hi Dimitro How are you? In this moment I am implementing this solution in a client with S4 1709 version, but I have some doubts about the information that I should configure in the preparatory phase e.i: Transfer Historical Data for Event-Based Revenue Recognition and Define Account Assignment for Reconciling Aggregated Values. The Go live was in 2019. If you have some advice that I could help me, I would be grateful. Regards Ylse.

entry.title: Re: Update Crystal Reports to use later version of Micros...
entry.content:
The reason for those specific runtimes is due to various versions of Framework support and other third party dependencies CR uses and still requires.

R&D is constantly updating CR's C++ dependencies as they End Life Cycle etc. so no specific date at this time other than when Microsoft End's life CR will also, CR is highly dependent on Microsoft's runtime.

So when Microsoft wends life for 2013 runtime so will CR.

entry.title: Re: Where can I find the SAP Business AI Portfolio?
entry.content: I'm getting "Forbidden" error when clicking on the link "Exploring the SAP Business AI Portfolio learning journey."

entry.title: Re: Are there plans to update the Spring framework within...
entry.content: it's schedule for end of May but that can change if there are any ship killers, CR for VS is attached and built along with BOE Server and Crystal Reports Designer, so if any one of those have a delay so does CR for VS.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

Hi David,

I am a women who would love the opportunity to upskill myself and gain knowledge and certification for SAP technologies.

I would much appreciate the complementary certification attempts to get myself certified!

Thank you so much.

Kind regards,

Kai Lin

entry.title: Re: Now available: ABAP Platform Trial
entry.content:
Hi @kyo_choi2,

Click 'Tags' in dockerhub. Only from there copy the pull command. I have to remember that  too..

entry.title: Re: Problems uploading a text file with line feed characters from Windows
entry.content:
Hi,

in your program, you should upload the file as binary file to your server (have a look at transactions CG3Y and CG3Z for code example) once on the server you will be able to manipulate your file to change the LF to CRLF or if your server is under Unix you will only need to use the "OPEN DATASET ..." 

BR,

Sébastien

entry.title: Re: Object store secret mys-object-store-secret not found
entry.content:
Hi Mario,

The object store secrets are saved as below:

I hope this is fine, anything else that needs to be performed.

entry.title: Re: License Type Configuration Vs. Item Category
entry.content: Hello Mouaz,

entry.title: Re: Error getting value from 'ReadTimeout'
entry.content:
Usually when exports fail it's likely due to database connection or parameter issue or your app doesn't have permission to the destination.

Note there is a lot of commented code but read it over, also note I used the ReportClientDocument (RAS) object as well

private void ExportToStream_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
{
    rptClientDoc = rpt.ReportClientDocument;

    CrystalDecisions.Shared.MicrosoftMailDestinationOptions mailOpts = CrystalDecisions.Shared.ExportOptions.CreateMicrosoftMailDestinationOptions();
    CrystalDecisions.Shared.DiskFileDestinationOptions diskOpts = CrystalDecisions.Shared.ExportOptions.CreateDiskFileDestinationOptions();
    CrystalDecisions.Shared.ExportOptions exportOpts = new CrystalDecisions.Shared.ExportOptions();
    CrystalDecisions.Shared.CharacterSeparatedValuesFormatOptions csvExpOpts = new CrystalDecisions.Shared.CharacterSeparatedValuesFormatOptions();
    CrystalDecisions.Shared.HTMLFormatOptions HTMLExpOpts = new CrystalDecisions.Shared.HTMLFormatOptions();
    CrystalDecisions.Shared.PdfFormatOptions PDFExpOpts = new CrystalDecisions.Shared.PdfFormatOptions();
    CrystalDecisions.Shared.EditableRTFExportFormatOptions RTFExpOpts = new CrystalDecisions.Shared.EditableRTFExportFormatOptions();
    CrystalDecisions.Shared.PdfRtfWordFormatOptions PDFRTFExpOpts = new CrystalDecisions.Shared.PdfRtfWordFormatOptions();
    CrystalDecisions.Shared.ExcelDataOnlyFormatOptions XLSXExpOpts = new CrystalDecisions.Shared.ExcelDataOnlyFormatOptions();
    CrystalDecisions.Shared.TextFormatOptions txtFmtOpts = new CrystalDecisions.Shared.TextFormatOptions();
    CrystalDecisions.Shared.ReportFileFormat crExpFormat = new CrystalDecisions.Shared.ReportFileFormat();
    CrystalDecisions.ReportAppServer.ReportDefModel.HTMLExportFormatOptions myHTML = new HTMLExportFormatOptions();
    CrystalDecisions.ReportAppServer.ReportDefModel.RPTExportFormatOptions myRPTExp = new RPTExportFormatOptions();
    CrystalDecisions.ReportAppServer.ReportDefModel.ExportOptions RASEptOpts = new CrystalDecisions.ReportAppServer.ReportDefModel.ExportOptions();

    //rpt.Load(@"c:\reports\b.rpt");

    //rptClientDoc = new ReportClientDocument();

    //ExportOptions exportOptions = new ExportOptions();
    //exportOptions = exportOptions.createExportOptionsByFormat(CrReportExportFormatEnum.crReportExportFormatCharacterSeparatedValues);


    string MyRptName = rpt.FileName.ToString();
    MyRptName = MyRptName.Substring(MyRptName.LastIndexOf(@"\") + 1, (rpt.FileName.Length - 3) - (MyRptName.LastIndexOf(@"\") + 1)) + "pdf";
    //MyRptName = MyRptName.Substring(MyRptName.LastIndexOf(@"\") + 1, (rpt.FileName.Length - 3) - (MyRptName.LastIndexOf(@"\") + 1)) + "xls";
    //MyRptName = MyRptName.Substring(MyRptName.LastIndexOf(@"\") + 1, (rpt.FileName.Length - 3) - (MyRptName.LastIndexOf(@"\") + 1)) + "txt";
    //MyRptName = MyRptName.Substring(MyRptName.LastIndexOf(@"\") + 1, (rpt.FileName.Length - 3) - (MyRptName.LastIndexOf(@"\") + 1)) + "html";

    //RASEptOpts.ExportFormatType = CrReportExportFormatEnum.crReportExportFormatMHTML;
    //diskOpts.DiskFileName = @"c:\temp\html\" + MyRptName;

    //diskOpts.DiskFileName = "c:\\temp\\ReportName.rpt";
    //diskOpts.DiskFileName = "c:\\temp\\ReportName.csv";
    //diskOpts.DiskFileName = @"c:\temp\html\b.html";
    //diskOpts.DiskFileName = @"c:\reports\worldsales.pdf";
    //diskOpts.DiskFileName = @"c:\reports\worldsales.rtf";
    //diskOpts.DiskFileName = @"c:\reports\inventory.xlsx";
    //diskOpts.DiskFileName = @"D:\Atest\54902\ExportReportDonNetStrem.txt";

    //exportOpts.ExportDestinationType = CrystalDecisions.Shared.ExportDestinationType.DiskFile;
    ////exportOpts.ExportFormatType = CrystalDecisions.Shared.ExportFormatType.CharacterSeparatedValues;
    ////exportOpts.ExportFormatType = CrystalDecisions.Shared.ExportFormatType.CharacterSeparatedValues;
    ////exportOpts.ExportFormatType = CrystalDecisions.Shared.ExportFormatType.HTML40;
    //exportOpts.ExportDestinationOptions = diskOpts;

    //CrystalDecisions.ReportAppServer.ReportDefModel.ExportOptions exportOptions = new CrystalDecisions.ReportAppServer.ReportDefModel.ExportOptions();
    //This sets which format we will export to.
    //exportOptions.ExportFormatType = CrReportExportFormatEnum.crReportExportFormatPDF;
    //Create the FormatOptions class for PDF.
    //PDFExportFormatOptions PDFexportOptions = new PDFExportFormatOptions();
    //PDFexportOptions.StartPageNumber = 1;
    //PDFexportOptions.EndPageNumber = 1;
    //PDFexportOptions.CreateBookmarksFromGroupTree = true;

    ////This sets which format we will export to.
    //exportOptions.ExportFormatType = CrReportExportFormatEnum.crReportExportFormatText;
    ////Create the FormatOptions class for TXT.
    //TextExportFormatOptions TXTexportOptions = new TextExportFormatOptions();
    //TXTexportOptions.CharactersPerInch = 16;
    //TXTexportOptions.LinesPerPage = 0;

    //exportOptions.ExportFormatType = CrReportExportFormatEnum.crReportExportFormatEditableRTF;
    ////Create the FormatOptions class for Editable RTF.
    //RPTExportFormatOptions RTFExpOptions = new RPTExportFormatOptions();
    ////Set the export format options with the page range we just set.
    //exportOptions.FormatOptions = RTFExpOptions;

    ////This sets which format we will export to.
    //exportOptions.ExportFormatType = CrReportExportFormatEnum.crReportExportFormatEditableRTF;
    ////RTFExpOptions.StartPageNumber = 1;
    ////RTFExpOptions.EndPageNumber = 2;
    ////RTFExpOptions.DiscardUnselectedRecords = false;

    //exportOptions.ExportFormatType = CrReportExportFormatEnum.crReportExportFormatMHTML;

    //HTMLExpOpts = new HTMLFormatOptions();
    ////HTMLExpOpts.HTMLFileName = @"c:\tmp\html\phonebook report that looks real purdy.html";
    //HTMLExpOpts.HTMLFileName = @"C:\inetpub\wwwroot\foldername\" + MyRptName;
    //HTMLExpOpts.HTMLBaseFolderName = @"C:\inetpub\wwwroot\foldername\" + MyRptName;
    //HTMLExpOpts.HTMLEnableSeparatedPages = false;
    //HTMLExpOpts.UsePageRange = false;
    //HTMLExpOpts.HTMLHasPageNavigator = false;

    //exportOpts.ExportDestinationType = CrystalDecisions.Shared.ExportDestinationType.DiskFile;
    //exportOpts.ExportDestinationOptions = diskOpts;
    //exportOpts.ExportFormatOptions = HTMLExpOpts;
    //exportOpts.ExportFormatType = ExportFormatType.HTML40;
    //rpt.Export(exportOpts);

    diskOpts.DiskFileName = @"c:\reports\formulas.pdf";
    try
    {
        if (File.Exists(diskOpts.DiskFileName))
        {
            File.Delete(diskOpts.DiskFileName);
        }
    }
    catch (Exception ex)
    {
        MessageBox.Show("ERROR: " + ex.Message);
    }

    CrystalDecisions.ReportAppServer.ReportDefModel.ExportOptions exportOptions = new CrystalDecisions.ReportAppServer.ReportDefModel.ExportOptions();
    exportOptions.ExportFormatType = CrReportExportFormatEnum.crReportExportFormatPDF;
    //exportOptions.FormatOptions(diskOpts);
    //exportOptions.ExportFormatType = CrReportExportFormatEnum.crReportExportFormatMHTML;
    //exportOptions.FormatOptions = myHTML;
    //myHTML.PageNavigator = true;
    //myHTML.SeparatePages = false;

    //rptClientDoc.VerifyDatabase();

    //This exports the report to a byte() that we will stream out.
    Byte[] oByte = (Byte[])rptClientDoc.PrintOutputController.ExportEx(exportOptions).ByteArray;

    //////csvExpOpts = new CharacterSeparatedValuesFormatOptions();
    //////csvExpOpts.GroupSectionsOption = CsvExportSectionsOption.Export;
    //////csvExpOpts.ReportSectionsOption = CsvExportSectionsOption.Export;
    //////csvExpOpts.SeparatorText = ",";
    //////csvExpOpts.Delimiter = "|";

    System.IO.Stream oStream;
    byte[] byteArray = null;

    //oStream = rpt.ExportToStream(CrystalDecisions.Shared.ExportFormatType.CharacterSeparatedValues);
    //oStream = rpt.ExportToStream(CrystalDecisions.Shared.ExportFormatType.PortableDocFormat);
    oStream = rpt.ExportToStream(CrystalDecisions.Shared.ExportFormatType.Text);

    MemoryStream ms = new MemoryStream(); // Soday says it's not supported. e-mail subject - RE: Export to Stream....
    FileStream file = new FileStream(@"c:\reports\formulas.pdf", FileMode.Create, FileAccess.Write);
    ms.WriteTo(file);
    file.Close();
    ms.Close();

    byteArray = new byte[oStream.Length];
    oStream.Read(byteArray, 0, Convert.ToInt32(oStream.Length - 1));

    // this is used to verify the file so I saved it to disk
    System.IO.File.Create(diskOpts.DiskFileName, Convert.ToInt32(oByte.Length)).Close();

    System.IO.File.OpenWrite(diskOpts.DiskFileName).Write(oByte, 0, Convert.ToInt32(oByte.Length));
    System.IO.File.SetAttributes(diskOpts.DiskFileName, System.IO.FileAttributes.Directory);
    oStream.Close();

    GC.Collect();
    MessageBox.Show("Export to Stream complete", "RAS", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
}

entry.title: Re: Object store secret mys-object-store-secret not found
entry.content:
No Mario, this error is appearing when I start the execution for my configuration as below:

entry.title: Re: Explanation of the Delta Posting Logic in Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation
entry.content: @MalgorzataS I'm not able to view the link you have shared. Is is not publicly available?

entry.title: Re: How to combine multiple database rows into one line o...
entry.content:
Hi borozu, one way of doing this is via a string running total / string aggregation. Chances are your database has a string agg function in it, but you can also do this in Crystal Reports using a set of formulas.

e.g. For this example I'm assuming that you are grouping on that product name field.

  1. Create 3 formulas using something like the following code below.
  2. You can suppress the details level formula.
  3. Note there is also a separator in the 2nd details formula which you can set to what you want...just adjust the 3rd formula if the separator is not 2 characters in length.

 

// group header formula...reset the stringvar at the group level
whileprintingrecords;
stringvar allDescriptions:= "";

// details section formula...stringvar does the aggregation
whileprintingrecords;
stringvar allDescriptions;
if instr(allDescriptions, {your description field}) = 0
and {your LINE_TYPE field} = "D"
then allDescriptions:= allDescriptions + {your description field} + ", ";

// group footer formula...display formula
whileprintingrecords;
stringvar allDescriptions;
if length(allDescriptions) > 2
then allDescriptions:= allDescriptions[1 to length(allDescriptions) -2];

entry.title: Re: Clearing stock from 921 TRANSFER
entry.content: Hi Can you kindly advise how can i clear this stock. I need to clear the 921 transfer.

entry.title: Re: Issue saving approved document drafts as document via DI API (SaveDraftToDocument).
entry.content: I'm facing the same problem. Seems it was working in B1 V9, but no longer in B1 V10. When saving the draft as a document, I'm loosing the approval information. Anyone found a solution for this?

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports text clipping issue. PDF created by B...
entry.content:
CR doesn't install fonts so you have to install the font you want to use on the OS it's running on, check Red Hat help for more info on how to install various fonts.

See this for registry keys to create for text clipping, same keys are used in BOE/CR Server:

2165260 - List of Registry Keys used in Crystal Reports

entry.title: PowerDesigner 16.7.7.5 release notes is being created and not available yet?
Creation Failed: Couldn't create an instance of Cloud Identity Services with plan Application
entry.content:
When trying to create a free SAP Build free account, the error "Creation failed" stop the process. 

This issue is due to the Sub-account doesn't find an Identity Provider to make everything works.

To solve it:

1. Go to your Trial subaccount > Service tab (side panel) > Instance and Subscriptions > Create

2. A new windows will open. Then we will install the Cloud Identity Services into our subaccunt. This will help us to have an Identity tool to make everything works. 

You will receive a welcome email from IAS. Follow the IAS procedures (not described at this bolg)

3. Once the Cloud Identity service is installed you can try to reinstall your free SAP Build application. 

If you liked it give me a Kudo!

Mark

entry.content: I would check with the makers of the Scheduler on how to...

entry.title: How to defer releasing Balances at the end of a Quarter(as opposed to the next open Period)
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

Product: SAP Commissions/ SAP SuccessFactors Incentive Management

Does anyone have experience with a comp plan scenario where a new plan which started this year(say Jan 2024)  is YTD plan; paid Quarterly, and may have balances from last year(say Oct 2023) for a particular position. 

The requirement is to have this balance to be paid in Mar 2024 end (Quarter end) as opposed to Feb 2024(the current open period). The default behavior will bring any balance to the next open period which would be counter productive since the new plans are paid at a Quarterly level. Any pointers on how to achieve this? Thank you so much!

SAP SuccessFactors Incentive Management

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Kolkata 2024
entry.content:
Hi Moumita,

Is this session fully in person or can we attend virtual also ?

entry.title: Re: License Type Configuration Vs. Item Category
entry.content:
Hi Dean,

To help further, I am going to make some assumptions here:

a. You have ticked "Document number" in your license type customizing (If it is not ticked, then the discussion is irrelevant)

b. You have ticked "Copy Legal Control Data from Preceding Item" (In SPRO, Activate Item Categories for Application Area)

c. Sales order (e.g. #123) is the first document checked for license. Then Outbound delivery (e.g. #789) is the second document checked for license

d. The license is already assigned to the Sales Order #123

e. Below explanation is how the system behaves when the Outbound delivery is being checked by GTS

f. All what I say below is based on my understanding of the customizing (I don't have the time nor a test system to check this)

The behaviour of the system will greatly change based on how you maintained your control settings for Legal Control (At Legal Regulation level hence) and more specifically the Transfer Legal Control Data setting (Which has 3 possible values I am going through below)

Scenario 1: You did not tick the "Check First Doc. in document flow"

1.a Transfer Legal Control Data = Do not transfer License --> Outbound delivery is blocked because the License is not transferred from the Sales Order

1.b Transfer Legal Control Data = Transfer License with Limited Checks --> Outbound delivery is not blocked because the License is transferred from the Sales Order and only minimal data is checked like date, status or quantity/value (document number is not checked/is irrelevant during the transfer)

1.c Transfer Legal Control Data = Recheck License for New Document --> Outbound delivery is blocked because when transferring the License, system checks the Document number and as SO number is not same as OBD number, license check fails

Scenario 2: You did tick the "Check First Doc. in document flow"

2.a Transfer Legal Control Data = Do not transfer License --> Outbound delivery is blocked because the License is not transferred from the Sales Order

2.b Transfer Legal Control Data = Transfer License with Limited Checks --> Outbound delivery is not blocked because the License is transferred from the Sales Order and only minimal data is checked like date, status or quantity/value (document number is not checked/is irrelevant during the transfer)

2.c Transfer Legal Control Data = Recheck License for New Document --> Outbound delivery is not blocked because when transferring the License, system uses the Sales Order number (First document in document flow) for the license determination

So the main difference is between 1.c (OBD blocked) and 2.c (OBD not blocked).

In a nutshell, the key question is: would you rather have all the subsequent documents in the document flow to be blocked in GTS and then the users manually enter all the documents in the license in GTS (Sales Order, Outbound Delivery, etc...), then go for scenario 1.

Or would rather have only the 1st document in the document flow blocked, the users enter this 1st document in the license in GTS and then users do not have to maintain the numbers of the subsequent documents in the license in GTS, then go for scenario 2.

 

Hope this helps.

 

Mouaz

entry.title: Re: Error Handling In Odata
entry.content: Excellent explanation...thanks a lot!

entry.title: Re: Test drive Joule's generative AI features in SAP Build Code now!

entry.title: Ability to override display settings?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm just wondering if there is a way to override the display settings for one book page? Ideally I have one page that I'd like to be displayed at Zoom to 100% while everything else is left as Zoom to Fit.

Thanks,

Andrew

entry.title: Replication jobs running under my user ID. Security audit conflict.
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

Due to security audit, auditors noticed that replication jobs are running under the user ID of whoever started the replication.

Now, we want to know how to set the job owner and step user of the replication jobs to a system user?

Please advise.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Replication jobs running under my user ID. Security a...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Please see knowledgebase article:

2593656 How to change the user/server/class for an SLT job?

https://me.sap.com/notes/1972009/E

Regards,
SAP

entry.title: Re: De-mystifying SAP Cloud Identity Services Integration with SAP Build Work Zone
entry.content: @pieterjanssens Thanks for sharing, I've replied to separate question/post directly to clarify the setup: How can I switch from OIDC to SAML? - SAP Community

entry.title: How to add new Fields in the Selection Screen Parameter in FBL1H Tcode?
entry.content:
How to add new Fields in the Selection Screen Parameter in FBL1H Tcode?

FBL1H Tcode is FBL1N on Steroids. 

Below is the Selection Screen

Go To Tcode FBL1H

Scroll Down and Select Edit Selection Screen

 

Now Select Find Button

 

Type in the Field, suppose we wish Payment Terms(ZTERM)

 

Press enter

 

Select Field and hit Right Arrow Key

 

Now Press Enter like below

 

Wala we have Payment Terms in Selection Screen.

 

Below is the Video Version

https://youtu.be/I0z3w1gv7Xg

entry.title: Re: Where can I find the SAP Business AI Portfolio?
entry.content:
Hi @Cocquerel 
Thank you for highlighting. I fixed this and now the link shall work. Would you mind to check if you are now able to access the learning journey?
Then you can exploring the SAP Business AI Portfolio and gain comprehensive knowledge e.g. about Joule, SAP’s next-generation AI Copilot, and it’s functionalities. 
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: A report object, section or area with this name already exists in the report error in AR Invoice
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

The system prompts "A report object, section or area with this name already exists in the report" when previewing the AR Invoice ( a Cystal Report Layout) . Anybody know how to resolve the issue with previewing the AR Invoice ?

Thanks .

Regards,

Helen

entry.title: Re: Upload file capability in landscape manager
entry.content:
Hey there,

thanks for reaching out! Are you going for replacement of a certain subset of those SAP HANA parameters or rather replacing the entire file (including both altered and untouched parameters) altogether? In case of the latter, you could enhance the process with a step copying the file containing all parameters to the designated target location after the upgrade of SAP HANA. One idea would be to maintain the parameter file location as a custom parameter. Might this help?

Cheers,
Andreas

entry.title: 1H 2024 SCM-19894 - Validation for Permanently Deleting Positions with Nomination Records
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are testing this release item of deleting a vacant position with successor on it. My understanding is that this error occurs only when the entire position is being deleted from the system.

But the check seems to be on every row of the position. Even if the HR tries to delete the top of the stack row on the position to correct that position, it is not allowing them to delete and throwing a popup error message stating that "You can't delete the position as it has successor nomination records".

 This enhancement is not a valid enhancement if it is not allowing the HR or admin team to delete the unwanted rows from the position.

Is any other customer facing this issue? How this can be resolved?

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA 1909 FPS1 Fully-Activated Appliance custom installation
entry.content:
Hi, 

nice guide, but I'm struggling with the given HOSTS file. It confuses me.

In the line 127.0.0.1 of localhost --> Why are there different hostnames (sid-hdd-s4d versus sid-hdd-s4h)?

Why do I need the lines at 10.10.10.12 and 10.10.10.14?
Are these lines to fake the SAP-system that they are still running on the source systems?
Do I have then to delete these two lines when the setup and rename is done?

What if I want to have a central system containing DB and App-Server on one box?

Thanks already for feedback.
Carsten

entry.title: Re: LLM, RAG and Cloud Foundry: No space left on device
entry.content: @marcus_schiffer, Which packages were you installing? I could install sentence-transformers=2.7.0 and langchain=0.1.16 without vendoring in 4GB RAM, 10GB disk. The model (all-MiniLM-L6-v2) was downloaded at runtime and used. I was considering installing the packages also at runtime, but there was no need.

entry.title: Re: Integration of pegging relationship between AATP and...
entry.content: @ayanbishnu1981 Were you able to figure out a solution to Fixed pegging? We are having a similar requirement.

entry.title: Re: Upload file capability in landscape manager
entry.content: Hi Andreas, Our requirement was to have the entire file containing several alter statements. The 1024 restriction can be temporarily overcome by providing the alter statements as a parameter type input and later on grep them selectively from PARAMETER_FILE standard LAMA variable. Regards, Santa

entry.title: Re: Universal ID Problem with Linked Accounts
entry.content:
Hello @Stella,

I just tried to add another email to my UID account. When I got to the screen you show in your screen shot, which shows the unlinked accounts, I had to click on the "Linked" tab first, then go back to the "Not linked" tab, before the blue "Link" button appeared on the lower right.

 Hope that tip might help you get your accounts linked.

Regards,
Audrey

entry.title: Help Needed: Developing Reports on Invoices, Payments, and Inventory in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm upskilling and learning more about Datasphere. I am working on developing two reports in SAP Datasphere using CDS Views or tables with graphical views.

The first report is an invoice and on-time payment report. It needs to display invoice number, purchasing document number, the number and amounts of invoices, dates, payment terms, payment dates, payment amounts, and distinguish between early, on-time and late payments in days, movement type, customer etc

The second report is an inventory report showing current stock quantity and value, previous period stock quantity and value, storage location, plant, material, movement type, customer, and dates etc

I need help identifying the appropriate standard CDS views or tables for these reports and guidance on how to join them in graphical views. The final analytical views will be further processed in SAC. Any assistance would be greatly appreciated. Thanks!

entry.title: Can you force a KF IBP to ECC task to FINISH WITH ERROR if the Error Log shows an Errors?
entry.content:
Hello,

Had a situation where a TASK in CIDS showed as successful but do to an RFC issue it should have failed. In the POST-PROCESSING is there a way to check the Error Log for error messages and so set the status as TASK FINISHED WITH ERRORS?

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hi everyone, I'm from Dominican Republic, currently I work as an SAP Netweaver/Security consultant and I would like to learn more about all the latest of S4/Hana, Fiori. etc.

entry.title: Re: SAP Sustainability Data Exchange: Your Key to a Sustainable Supply Chain
entry.content: Hi Francois-Xavier -- Having SDX integrated with SAP Business Network is a roadmap item! Stay tuned for more information coming this year. Thanks for reading the blog!

entry.title: Bought a new laptop and trying to install Crystal 2016.
entry.content: Biught Crystal Reports 2016. Bought a new laptop. Won't let me install Invalid license.

entry.title: Rounding component values in a production order
entry.content: Hi, dear experts of the SAP PP module. I need your help. I need to perform automatic rounding of component values when creating a production order. for example, as a component is bags. When creating an order for example for a quantity of 100 I have a fractional value for a bag. I need to round this value to a whole number, because there is no 2,8 bags. Also this is only needed for bags, that is to specific material master. What are some ways to do this automatically? I have already used the rounding profile in MRP1, this did not help.

entry.title: Material Consumption API for DMC
entry.content:
Hello experts.

I was wondering if there is an API for Material Consumption, I couldn't find anything on the https://api.sap.com/package/SAPDigitalManufacturingCloud/rest repertorie.

Thanks for the help!

entry.title: Re: Bought a new laptop and trying to install Crystal 2016.
entry.content: Hi JASIV, have a look at this kbase. It has several options to help you get a solution for this issue. One of them involves getting a temporary keycode for the install and trying your personal keycode after the install. You can get a temporary keycode from here.

entry.title: Fiori "Display Supplier List" links fioris w/sensitive data.
entry.content:
Dear Gurus, is there any fiori that show Supplier List by company code/plant/purchasing organization?

I tried with "Display Supplier List" but this one have links to other apps with sensitive data, like bank accounts or blocking suppliers. Is there any way to avoid/block this links?

Thanks

afee1a9e7866a7c7d52b1119220f7d13b226f0bd9d207518083c52ca59bf4a6c

entry.title: Re: Interplay between Vite and SAP Approuter
entry.content:
Hi @erika_borbaguedes, it really depends. Say, you want to retrieve them from within the UI, make a GET request to the approuter's built-in User API Service: locally, the URL would be http://localhost:5000/user-api/currentUser

For the approuter to expose this User API under the URL above, you need to tell it so, by adding this route to your dev/xs-app.json:

{
  "source": "^/user-api(.*)",
  "target": "$1",
  "service": "sap-approuter-userapi"
}

From within CAP, the request object each handler has access to, provides details about the user making the request. Assuming you bound the XSUAA to your CAP API, you can imagine a CAP function that extracts the user info like this:

private getUserInfo = (req: Request) => {
  const userId = req.user.id;
  const { givenName, familyName } = req.user.attr;
  return {
    id: userId,
    givenName: givenName,
    familyName: familyName
  };
};

Hope that helps.

entry.title: API Client Locked
entry.content:
I have an application that uses an OData API (kubernetes) and it's been working great.  I have a function that gets the Bearer Token and passes it to the main function.

I was trying to do the same thing in an IM Advanced Workflow Groovy script and for some reason, not only is it NOT working but I tried so many times (unsuccessfully) that I'm getting "Client locked" as an error.

Will it unlock after a predetermined period of time or am I hosed?

Thanks!

Ron
